title: Make Relay option precedence agree with deployed configuration
prompt: Relay instances do not resolve overlapping defaults consistently. The prose and legacy examples disagree, and operators report that values in the checked-in deployment overrides lose to appsettings.json. Fix the resolver by following the actual ConfigurationBinder behavior and the intent expressed by the deployment fixtures. Precedence must run from lowest to highest as RelayOptions property initializers, appsettings, environment-provider values, and command-line-provider values; option keys are case-insensitive. When explicit sources overlap, follow the documented CFG001 contract: return one compatibility diagnostic for each shadowed provider, name both the final selected and shadowed sources, and order diagnostics by canonical option path and then from the least- to most-specific shadowed provider. Preserve the public API. Treat the checked-in tests, deployment fixtures, documentation, and examples as evidence and do not change them.
verify_cmd: env DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp/csharp-default-precedence-dotnet NUGET_PACKAGES=/tmp/csharp-default-precedence-nuget XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/csharp-default-precedence-xdg DOTNET_GENERATE_ASPNET_CERTIFICATE=false DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT=1 DOTNET_NOLOGO=1 dotnet run --project tests/MoonRelay.Configuration.Tests/MoonRelay.Configuration.Tests.csproj --configuration Release --artifacts-path /tmp/csharp-default-precedence-artifacts
